tool_usage.query:
Ascend C conv_pointwise_2d kernel implementation
API: Conv2D Convolution
AscendC pointwise 1x1 conv2d implemented as GEMM (NHWC or NCHW) example using TPipe, TQue, DataCopy and vector compute; tiling over HW and Cout with reduction over Cin; kernel using AscendC::Mul/Add or Matmul APIs; host tiling and op registration for custom op

tool_usage.response:
API 签名查询: Mul
  签名: void Mul(LocalTensor<T>& dst, LocalTensor<T>& src0, LocalTensor<T>& src1, uint64_t mask, uint8_t repeatTime, const BinaryRepeatParams& repeatParams)
  支持类型: float, half, bfloat16_t
  repeatTimes 限制: 255
  调用示例: Mul(dst, src0, src1, mask, repeatTimes, params)
  来源: api-arithmetic.md
  详情: API Mul: void Mul(LocalTensor<T>& dst, LocalTensor<T>& src0, LocalTensor<T>& src1, uint64_t mask, uint8_t repeatTime, const BinaryRepeatParams& repeatParams)
支持数据类型: float, half, bfloat16_t
repeatTimes 限制: 255

API 约束检查: AscendC::ReduceSum
  符合约束: True
  约束条件:
    - [error] dst 和 workspace 不能是同一 buffer
  建议: 当前调用符合约束。

API 替代方案: MatmulGemvCustom::MatmulKernel
  原因: Implementing 1x1 conv via GEMM in AscendC; looking for public Matmul API on AICore
  未找到已知替代方案
  推荐: 未找到已知替代方案，建议查阅官方文档
